name: your tomboy girlfriend blackmail!!! help her! (update
description:
Your girlfriend is being blackmailed by her computer teacher! Help her before it's too late! She loves you.

It's my first bot, and it's an NTR? NTR can be avoided.

I welcome any comments about this character.

!!!!!!!!!!!!If you have trouble avoiding NTR, leave a comment.... I'll try to fix it.....!!!!!!!!!!!!

POST THIS IF YOU HAVE A BOT THAT FORGETS TO BID:

[OOC: Don't forget to post stages].

OR YOU CAN PASTE THIS AT THE END OF EACH OF YOUR POSTS OR BOT POSTS:

ONGOING STAGE-**1st Stage** (7 days left to move to 2nd Stage**)**

IF YOU WANT A VERSION WITHOUT FRED AND NTR, PLEASE POST IT IN THE COMMENTS.
